title: Quick Coords
description: Share your exact coordinates in chat with a single keypress! Lightweight, fast, and essential for every player. 📍
body:
📍 QuickCoords - Never Get Lost Again!
Are you tired of manually typing your coordinates in chat while running from a Creeper? 🏃‍♂️💥 Or maybe you are tired of pressing F3 and getting a headache from all the text on the screen? QuickCoords is here to save your life!

🌟 What is QuickCoords?
QuickCoords is a lightweight, performance-friendly mod designed for players who value speed and efficiency. With just a single keypress, you can share your exact location with everyone on the server!

✨ Features
🚀 Instant Sharing: Share your X, Y, Z coordinates instantly in the global chat.

⌨️ Customizable Keybind: Default key is K, but you can change it to anything you want in the controls menu!

🌍 Multi-Version Support: Built for 1.21.4 but fully compatible up to 1.21.11!

🛠️ Client-Side Only: No server-side installation needed. Just put it in your mods folder and you are good to go!

💨 Super Lightweight: Zero lag, zero bloat. Just pure utility.

🛠 How to Use
Drop the QuickCoords.jar into your mods folder.

Launch the game and jump into any world or server.

Press K to broadcast your location! 📍

📥 Compatibility
Compatible with 1.21.4 through 1.21.11

Works on all Multiplayer Servers

Compatible with most other mods
